vocab.meaning: miễn cưỡng chi một khoản tiền lớn
vocab.example: I had to fork out a small fortune for these orthopedic shoes because of my back pain.

vocab.word: pay an arm and a leg
vocab.meaning: trả một cái giá cực kỳ đắt
vocab.example: While some people pay an arm and a leg for limited-edition sneakers, I prefer more affordable brands.

vocab.meaning: mua được món hời (giá rẻ hơn bình thường)
vocab.example: I usually wait for the Black Friday sales to pick up a bargain on high-end running shoes.

vocab.meaning: để mắt tới, chờ đợi (cơ hội/giảm giá)
vocab.example: I always keep an eye out for discounts so I don't have to pay full price for my footwear.
These Italian leather loafers cost a pretty penny, but their quality is absolutely top-notch.

vocab.meaning: ngốn của ai đó một khoản tiền
vocab.example: A decent pair of hiking boots can set you back about two hundred dollars, but they last for years.

vocab.meaning: rẻ mà tốt, chất lượng ổn so với giá
vocab.example: For everyday wear, I often go for something cheap and cheerful from local high-street brands.
I'm not the type to splash the cash on shoes every month; I only buy them when I truly need to.

vocab.meaning: cảm thấy túng thiếu (do tiêu quá nhiều hoặc kinh tế khó khăn)
vocab.example: After buying those designer heels, I really started to feel the pinch toward the end of the month.

vocab.meaning: mua được với giá rất rẻ
vocab.example: I managed to buy these vintage boots for a song at a local thrift store last weekend.
